ERR-001: Validation failed. Please review the submitted data.
ERR-004: You do not have permission to {{action}} this {{object}}.
ERR-005: The Organization context is missing or invalid.
ERR-006: This reference belongs to another Organization.
ERR-008: The {{field}} of this {{object}} cannot be changed.
ERR-010: This {{object}} was changed by another request. Please reload and try again.
ERR-012: The value of {{field}} does not match the expected field type.
ERR-013: The selected field option is invalid or does not belong to this field.
ERR-014: A primary field must also be required.
ERR-015: Only one active primary field is allowed.
ERR-016: The final active primary field cannot be removed.
ERR-017: This {{object}} cannot be changed because active {{dependency}} exists.
ERR-020: The template is not published or is invalid.
ERR-023: The idempotency key was reused with a different payload.
ERR-024: OwnerUserId or the OWNER role is missing.
ERR-025: The final active owner cannot be removed or deactivated.
ERR-026: The number of active occupants exceeds the room capacity.
ERR-027: The room still has an active renter stay.
ERR-028: This renter already has an active renter stay.
ERR-029: This file type or MIME type is not supported.
ERR-030: The file exceeds the allowed size.
ERR-031: The file is waiting for a security scan and is not available yet.
ERR-032: The file was rejected by the security scan.
ERR-034: The object storage service is temporarily unavailable.
ERR-035: The requested slot is invalid or was not found.
ERR-039: The requested override is not allowed.
ERR-040: Too many requests. Please try again later.
ERR-041: The external identity mapping conflicts with an existing mapping.
ERR-043: This staff membership cannot perform the requested action.
ERR-044: The maximum occupant value is invalid.
ERR-045: The value of a field option cannot be changed.
ERR-046: The start date and end date are invalid.
ERR-047: The requested document state transition is invalid.
ERR-048: The job exceeded its retry limit.
ERR-050: An unexpected system error occurred. Please use the correlation ID when contacting support.
